briefdescription.para: Returns the full path to a global variable.

parameterdescription.para: location of the global variable, must exist
initial value of the variable. Will only be used if it is created. 0 by default.

briefdescription.para: Returns the full path to a global string.

parameterdescription.para: location of the global string, must exist
initial value of the string. Will only be used if it is created. null by default.

briefdescription.para: Helper function to get read-only access to a global variable.

parameterdescription.para: absolute path to a global variable

briefdescription.para: Helper function to get read-only access to a global string.

parameterdescription.para: absolute path to a global string

briefdescription.para: Returns the full path to the mies-igor version string. Creating it when necessary.

detaileddescription.para: Never ever write this string!

briefdescription.para: Return the version string for the mies-igor project.

detaileddescription.para: The mies version looks like

para.verbatim:
or #UNKNOWN_MIES_VERSION on error
@returns the mies version

briefdescription.para: Returns the absolute path to the variable runMode

detaileddescription.para: The variable holds one of DAQRunModes.

briefdescription.para: Return the list of follower devices of a lead device.
Returns the absolute path to the device ID.
Returns the absolute path to the global variable count storing the number of data acquisition cycles performed.

detaileddescription.para: Count equals zero on the first sweep.

briefdescription.para: Returns the list of locked devices.
Return the absolute path to the user comment string.
Return the stop collection point, this is a length.
Return the ADC to monitor.

detaileddescription.para: This is the first actice AD channel in DAQDataWave and DAQConfigWave.

briefdescription.para: Return global device for background tasks.

xrefdescription.para: remove and use background struct members for the deviceID and GetDeviceMapping instead

briefdescription.para: Return the active set count.

detaileddescription.para: Active set count keeps track of how many steps of the largest currently selected set on all active channels still have to be done. Not counting the currently acquiring sweep.

briefdescription.para: Return the interactive mode.

detaileddescription.para: By default MIES operates in interactive mode (1) in the main thread and in non-interactive mode in preemptive threads. The user can change that to non-interactive mode where all dialog/popups etc. are avoided and replaced with sensible defaults.

briefdescription.para: Returns the absolute path to the testpulse running modes, holds one of TestPulseRunModes.
Returns NI device list.

detaileddescription.para: Internal use only, prefer DAP_GetNIDeviceList() instead.

briefdescription.para: Returns ITC device list.

detaileddescription.para: Internal use only, prefer DAP_GetITCDeviceList() instead.

briefdescription.para: Returns the last time stamp HW_NI_RepeatAcqHook was called.
Returns FIFO file reference.
Returns TestPulse Counter for Background Task.
Returns the current NI setup string for analog in through DAQmx_Scan.
Returns the ADC task ID set after DAQmx_Scan in HW_NI_StartAcq.
Returns the DAC task ID set after DAQmx_WaveFormGen in HW_NI_PrepareAcq.
Returns the TTL task ID set by DAQmx_DIO_Config in HW_NI_PrepareAcq.
Return the experiment session start time in NWB-speech.

detaileddescription.para: This is the time when the last device was locked.

briefdescription.para: Return the HDF5 file identifier for the NWB export.
Return the absolute path to the file for NWB export.
Return the experiment session start time in NWB-speech as read back from the NWB file.
Return the thread group ID for the FIFO monitor/resetting daemon.
Return the absolute path to the temporary global string.

detaileddescription.para: Callers should always assume that this string contains garbage.

briefdescription.para: Return the absolute path to the temporary global variable.

detaileddescription.para: Callers should always assume that this variable contains garbage.

briefdescription.para: Return the absolute path to the RNG seed value.

detaileddescription.para: This seed value can be used for deriving device dependent random numbers.
Typical sequence:

para.verbatim: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * NVAR rngSeed = $GetRNGSeed(device) * SetRandomSeed/BETR=1 rngSeed * rngSeed += 1 * variable val = GetReproducibleRandonNumber() *

briefdescription.para: Return the absolute path to the repeated acquisition cycle ID.
Return the absolute path to the repurposed sweep time global variable.

detaileddescription.para: Units are seconds.

briefdescription.para: Return the list of functions to be executed after ITI in repeated acquisition.
Return the start time, in ticks, of the ITI cycle.
Return the duration, in ticks, of the ITI cycle.
Return the current fifo position (a length)

detaileddescription.para: Only valid if called during DAQ with DATA_ACQUISITION_MODE. This value is relative to first row of the rawDACWave, so an possible offset is already included in it.

briefdescription.para: Return the error counter for the analysis function management.

detaileddescription.para: Mainly used during testing to ensure that no RTE was thrown.

briefdescription.para: Return the maximum ITI of all active sets.

detaileddescription.para: Only meaningful after preparing DAQ in DC_Configure()

briefdescription.para: Return the version number of the Igor experiment.
Return the version number of the Igor experiment loaded into the analysis browser.
Return the JSON ID for the sweep formula.
Return the formula error message for the sweep formula.
Return the JSON id of the settings file.

detaileddescription.para: Loads the stored settings on disc if required.

briefdescription.para: Return the path to the acquisition state.

detaileddescription.para: Holds one of AcquisitionStates

briefdescription.para: Return the global bug count, incremented by Bug()

detaileddescription.para: Mostly used for testing.

briefdescription.para: Temporary storage for IP history and logfile.

detaileddescription.para: Used for reexporting from NWBv1 into NWBv2, see AB_ReExport()

briefdescription.para: Return the absolute path to the test pulse cycle ID.
Helper functions for accessing global variables and strings.

detaileddescription.para: The functions GetNVARAsString() and GetSVARAsString() are static as they should not be used directly.

Instead if you have a global variable named iceCreamCounter in root:myfood you would write in this file here a function like embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * Function/S GetIceCreamCounterAsVariable() * return GetNVARAsString(createDFWithAllParents("root:myfood"), "iceCreamCounter") * End * and then use it in your code as embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * Function doStuff() * NVAR iceCreamCounter = $GetIceCreamCounterAsVariable() * * iceCreamCounter += 1 * End *
if you want to ensure that you only get read-only access you can use ROVar() as in

para.verbatim: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * Function doStuffReadOnly() * variable iceCreamCounter = ROVar(GetIceCreamCounterAsVariable()) * * iceCreamCounter += 1 * End *

detaileddescription.para: this avoids accidental changes.
